prompt: A full-body fashion editorial photograph of a young woman with straight dark auburn hair parted to the side, wearing light blue tinted round sunglasses and small pearl drop earrings. She wears a powder-blue cropped blazer with structured shoulders over a white satin camisole, paired with a matching powder-blue high-waisted midi pencil skirt with a front slit, and light blue pointed-toe stiletto heels. She stands on a minimalist white modern rooftop terrace with geometric architectural walls and railings, one arm resting casually on a white ledge, legs crossed at the ankle in a relaxed contrapposto pose. The setting is bright daylight with a clear blue sky, strong directional sunlight casting sharp architectural shadows across the white tile floor. The photography style is high-end fashion catalog/editorial, clean and airy, shot with a shallow depth of field, soft diffused skin tones, crisp fabric detail, color palette dominated by soft blues and whites, symmetrical minimalist composition, professional studio-quality lighting despite being outdoors, 4k, ultra-realistic, commercial fashion photography.
promptEn: A full-body fashion editorial photograph of a young woman with straight dark auburn hair parted to the side, wearing light blue tinted round sunglasses and small pearl drop earrings. She wears a powder-blue cropped blazer with structured shoulders over a white satin camisole, paired with a matching powder-blue high-waisted midi pencil skirt with a front slit, and light blue pointed-toe stiletto heels. She stands on a minimalist white modern rooftop terrace with geometric architectural walls and railings, one arm resting casually on a white ledge, legs crossed at the ankle in a relaxed contrapposto pose. The setting is bright daylight with a clear blue sky, strong directional sunlight casting sharp architectural shadows across the white tile floor. The photography style is high-end fashion catalog/editorial, clean and airy, shot with a shallow depth of field, soft diffused skin tones, crisp fabric detail, color palette dominated by soft blues and whites, symmetrical minimalist composition, professional studio-quality lighting despite being outdoors, 4k, ultra-realistic, commercial fashion photography.
promptZh: 一张全身时尚杂志风格摄影作品，主角是一位年轻女性，留着 侧分深红棕色直发，佩戴浅蓝色圆框墨镜和珍珠吊坠耳环。她身穿 淡蓝色 短款垫肩西装外套，内搭白色缎面吊带背心，下身搭配同色系淡蓝色高腰中长款铅笔裙（前开叉设计），脚踩淡蓝色尖头细高跟鞋。她站在 极简主义现代白色屋顶露台 上，背景是几何建筑墙体和栏杆，一只手臂随意地搭在白色边缘上，双腿在脚踝处交叉，呈现出放松的对立式构图。场景为明亮的日光下，天空湛蓝，强烈的定向阳光在白色瓷砖地面上投射出锐利的建筑阴影。摄影风格为高端时尚目录/杂志大片，画面干净通透，采用浅景深拍摄，肤色柔和自然，织物细节清晰，色调以柔和的蓝色和白色为主，构图对称简约，虽为户外拍摄但具备专业摄影棚级的布光效果，4k 分辨率，超写实，商业时尚摄影。
